name: Trellis.2 GGUF
description: Aero-Ex Trellis.2 — GGUF quantized image-to-3D model (1–3 B params). Generates a geometry mesh in one pass via sparse structure + shape SLaT. Requires ~6–10 GB VRAM depending on quantization.
author: Lightning Pixel

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.tooltip: Resolution and number of cascade steps. Higher = better detail, slower.

params_schema.label: GGUF Quantization
params_schema.tooltip: GGUF quantization level. Less VRAM = slightly less accurate.

params_schema.label: Sparse Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the sparse structure (coarse geometry). More = better quality, slower.

params_schema.label: Shape Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the geometry SLaT (fine details).

params_schema.label: Foreground Ratio
params_schema.tooltip: Proportion of the canvas occupied by the subject after background removal.

params_schema.label: Remesh Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Voxel grid resolution used for the post-generation narrow-band remesh. Higher = fewer holes and junction artifacts, but more VRAM and time.

params_schema.label: Texture Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion resolution for texture SLaT encoding. 1024 gives better quality.

params_schema.label: Texture Atlas Size
params_schema.tooltip: Output texture atlas resolution. Larger = sharper textures.

params_schema.label: Texture Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for texture generation. More = better quality, slower.

params_schema.label: Guidance Strength
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength for texture diffusion.

params_schema.label: Foreground Ratio
params_schema.tooltip: Proportion of the canvas occupied by the subject after background removal.
